summary.lv: Ubiquiti Latvia meklē vecāko SRE/DevOps inženieri/-i, kurš/-a administrēs AWS infrastruktūru, automatizēs izvietošanu ar Terraform un uzlabos CI/CD procesus.
summary.en: Ubiquiti Latvia seeks a Senior SRE/DevOps Engineer to administer AWS infrastructure, automate deployments with Terraform, and improve CI/CD pipelines.
